testcase.name: test tooling runs the test harness

testcase.name: TagService loads and sorts tags by name

testcase.name: TagService deletes a tag by id

testcase.classname: TagService renames a tag by id

testcase.classname: TagService counts matching work items across projects and skips project failures
testcase.name: TagService counts matching work items across projects and skips project failures

testcase.classname: TagService returns work item ids that contain a tag
testcase.name: TagService returns work item ids that contain a tag

testcase.classname: TagService merges source tags into target and deletes source tag
testcase.name: TagService merges source tags into target and deletes source tag

testcase.classname: TagService does not patch work items when transformed tag set is unchanged
testcase.name: TagService does not patch work items when transformed tag set is unchanged

testcase.classname: TagService loads work items in batches of 200 for updates
testcase.name: TagService loads work items in batches of 200 for updates

testcase.classname: TagService throws when project context is unavailable
testcase.name: TagService throws when project context is unavailable

testcase.classname: TagTable shows zero data state when no tags are available
testcase.name: TagTable shows zero data state when no tags are available

testcase.classname: TagTable toggles row selection and select-all
testcase.name: TagTable toggles row selection and select-all

testcase.classname: StatusLog does not render when empty
testcase.name: StatusLog does not render when empty

testcase.classname: StatusLog expands and renders log entries
testcase.name: StatusLog expands and renders log entries

testcase.classname: Hub bootstrap initializes SDK, renders app, and notifies load success
testcase.name: Hub bootstrap initializes SDK, renders app, and notifies load success

testcase.classname: MergeDialog supports selecting an existing suggestion
testcase.name: MergeDialog supports selecting an existing suggestion

testcase.classname: MergeDialog shows create-new affordance for unknown target tag
testcase.name: MergeDialog shows create-new affordance for unknown target tag

testcase.name: TagManagerApp loads tags and renders management actions
